root.name: Add 'mysterious' to the negative section of the word bank
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent added the word 'mysterious' (and only that word) to the negative section of the word bank, without making extraneous changes.

children.name: 'Mysterious' is present in the negative section of the word bank
children.description: Checks that the word 'mysterious' has been added to the negative section of the word bank on the appropriate slide(s).

children.name: No extraneous changes were made
children.description: Ensures that no unrelated changes (e.g., other words added/removed, slide formatting, animations, transitions, or slides) were made beyond the addition of 'mysterious' to the negative word bank.

metadata.task: Add the word 'mysterious' to the negative section of the word bank
